title: Higgins Music Hub - Part 2 Section 2 Implementation

requirements.summary: Implement Part 2 Section 2 features identified in portalAudit.ts and rollout documentation, continuing the portal build sequence from Part 2 Section 1
acceptanceCriteria: All features scoped to Part 2 Section 2 are implemented and functional
No regressions introduced to features shipped in Part 2 Section 1
Backend Motoko code compiles without errors
New functionality is accessible through the existing portal routing structure

file_operations.description: Review the current audit findings to identify which features are marked as Part 2 Section 2. Verify the priority levels (high/medium/low) and section assignments for incomplete items. This file serves as the single source of truth for what remains to be built.

Review the remaining deployment steps to understand the rollout sequence and identify any Part 2 Section 2 scope items. Verify which steps have been completed and which are pending. Update completion status for any Section 2 work as it is implemented.

If Part 2 Section 2 includes new admin dashboard features or metrics based on the audit findings, implement those additions. Ensure the PortalAuditSummary component continues to reflect accurate completion status for newly implemented sections.

If Part 2 Section 2 includes membership-related features identified in the audit (e.g., tier management, filtering, or additional fields), implement those capabilities. Ensure all membership CRUD operations remain functional and integrate any new UI components needed.

Implement any Section 2 enhancements to the membership detail view based on audit findings. This may include additional inline-editable fields, tier selection UI, or agreement management capabilities. Verify related entity linking continues to work after changes.

If Part 2 Section 2 scope includes publishing work enhancements (e.g., advanced filtering, batch operations, or metadata fields), implement those features. Maintain consistency with the existing create/duplicate/bulk-delete patterns.

Implement any Section 2 enhancements to publishing work detail views identified in the audit. This may include ISWC/ISRC validation, ownership split visualization, or contributor role assignment. Ensure change history tracking continues to function.

If Part 2 Section 2 includes label/release features from the audit (e.g., workflow checklist management, distribution status tracking, or release scheduling), implement those capabilities. Ensure the releases table and bulk operations remain functional.

Implement any Section 2 enhancements to release detail views based on audit findings. This may include workflow checklist editing, key date management, or owner assignment UI. Verify the tracklist and key dates arrays render and update correctly.

If Part 2 Section 2 scope includes recording project features (e.g., asset reference management, session notes, or advanced status filtering), implement those capabilities. Maintain consistency with existing project creation and management patterns.

Implement any Section 2 enhancements to recording project detail views identified in the audit. This may include asset reference fields, participant role management, or session metadata. Ensure inline editing and related entity linking continue to work.

If Part 2 Section 2 includes artist development features from the audit (e.g., milestone tracking, goal filtering, or plan visualization), implement those capabilities. Ensure the artist list table and bulk operations remain functional.

Implement any Section 2 enhancements to artist development detail views based on audit findings. This may include milestone editing UI, goal progress tracking, or plan timeline visualization. Verify goals, plans, and milestones arrays render and update correctly.

As Part 2 Section 2 features are implemented, remove or update any SectionPlaceholder components that were serving as temporary UI for those features. Ensure the priority-based styling (high/medium/low) accurately reflects remaining unbuilt sections.

Verify the audit summary correctly reflects newly completed Section 2 features. Update the component to filter out or mark completed any audit findings that are resolved by Section 2 work. Ensure the grouped, prioritized display remains accurate.

If Part 2 Section 2 introduces new backend queries or mutations (beyond those already defined in the backend interface), add corresponding React Query hooks. Ensure all hooks follow the existing patterns for error handling, caching, and invalidation.

If Part 2 Section 2 requires enhancements to the related entity linking dialog (e.g., new entity types, validation rules, or UI improvements), implement those changes. Ensure the dialog continues to support all existing link operations across all five entity types.

If Section 2 introduces new related record types or visualization requirements, update the RelatedRecordsSection component. Maintain the existing badge-based navigation and ensure human-readable label resolution continues to work for non-admin users.

Update the smoke test checklist to include verification steps for all Part 2 Section 2 features. Add new test cases for any implemented functionality while preserving existing Section 1 test coverage. Document expected outcomes and entity ID requirements.

Update the session log template to include fields for recording Section 2 feature test results. Add columns or sections for capturing entity IDs, console output, and pass/fail outcomes specific to newly implemented capabilities.
